Funnel #6: The Trust Builder
ABOUT THIS FUNNEL
Suited to both beginner and experienced marketers - this funnel was specifically built to for those with an aversion to sales calls as it builds trust with leads and prospects BEFORE even
pitching them.
Works niched and unniched.
For marketers getting started out or without case studies - retarget using the $500 ad spend hook.
For marketers with case studies - retarget straight up leveraging those previous results.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 3 --

IMPORTANT:
This funnel uses the SAME backend as all other funnels (calendar, form, thank you page) - HOWEVER, the form is before the calendarin this case.
What You'll Need
Funnel landing pages (we use ClickFunnels in this example)
1-2 min video (Template provided, we recommend Screenflow for recording)
Ads & ad account
Important Links
Download the full funnel into your ClickFunnels account
https://app.clickfunnels.com/funnels/4930440/share/4720ggxcir23yldk
Download the powerpoint assets:
https://www.dropbox.com/sh/uxkcug1gxomab2w/AAA4j3PsuUiTZHjsJ_sSg6rLa?dl=0
Landing Page Links
Buffer Page: 	https://catherine143.clickfunnels.com/squeeze-page17793568
Wuffoo Page: 	https://catherine143.clickfunnels.com/sales-page17793569
ScheduleOnce Page: 	https://catherine143.clickfunnels.com/order-form17793570
Thank You Page: 	https://catherine143.clickfunnels.com/thank-you17793571
Cancellation Page: 	https://catherine143.clickfunnels.com/thank-you-customer-cancels17793572
Step by Step
Step #1: 	Download funnel to ClickFunnels account
Step #2: 	Download and customise powerpoint
Step #3: 	Record 1-2min value based video for your niche (recommend Screenflow here)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 3 --

Step #4: 	Edit video
Step #5: 	Create TOF ad using video
Step #6: 	Create Wuffo form and redirect based on conditional logic to Clickfunnel pages accordingly (send to calendar if they pass, send to “Cancelled” if duds)
Step #7: 	Embed wuffoo form into “Wuffoo Form” page of funnel
Step #8: 	Create Schedule Once and redirect calendar (after 0 seconds) to Thank you page
Step #9: 	Customise funnel with your Business Name and copy (optional: create subdomain)
Step #10: 	Add in Pixel and Standard Events:
Standard Event: Lead on “Thank You” page
Custom Event: Form Complete on “Viewed Buffer” page
Custom Event: Form Complete on “Schedule Once” page
Step #11: 	Create custom conversions of custom events (you may need to wait an hour for these to trigger back to account)
Step #12: 	Create Custom Audiences:
Viewed 10 sec Video last 7 Days
Lead 180 Days
Lead 3 days
Viewed Booked Call Page
Viewed Buffer Page - 7 days
Step #13: 	Create MOF campaign. Link Click Objective. Send ads to “Buffer page”
Step #14: 	Create BOF campaign. Set up as Post Engagement Objective.
Retarget Viewed Buffer Page - 7 Days (exc: Leads)
Retarget Lead 3 Days (show them an article, testimonial, or credibility building ad.
support@cathowell.com
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
